classes.reasoning: This document contains a comprehensive safety results section (Section 5) with detailed treatment-emergent adverse events, safety parameter tables, adjudicated cardiovascular events, hepatic safety data, immunogenicity analysis, and neurocognitive safety assessments over a 24-week treatment period. The structured presentation of safety data for 148 patients (74 active, 74 placebo), including SAE rates, discontinuations, and conclusions supporting continued development, is characteristic of a Clinical Study Report.

summary: This is a safety results section from a Clinical Study Report documenting a 24-week placebo-controlled trial of a PCSK9 inhibitor (150 mg SC q4w) in 148 statin-intolerant patients. The report provides detailed analysis of adverse events, cardiovascular safety, hepatic events, immunogenicity, and neurocognitive assessments, concluding that the investigational product demonstrated a favorable safety profile supporting continued Phase III development with enhanced hepatic monitoring.
references_to: Phase III protocol as an amendment
CANTAB battery at baseline and Week 24
published data for approved PCSK9 inhibitors
